title: Ultratape 75mm x 33m Black DPC Jointing Tape
features: Can be used to repairing polythene films
description: The Ultratape DPC Polythene Jointing Tape is best used as a jointing tape for damp proof coursing as well as a repair tape for splicing and repairing polythene films. Useful for protecting electrical and automotive wiring. Available here 75mm width by 33m length.
